states.name: Elmina
states.title: Violet-Eyed Assassin
states.description: Elmina's past is dark and cruel, and it will never leave her. But that darkness is what gives her strength, and makes her kind.

states.name: Elmina
states.title: Violet-Eyed Assassin
states.description: "I'm not going to let anyone fool me ever again. But it doesn't mean I don't want to trust you all, though."

states.name: Elmina
states.title: Violet-Eyed Assassin
states.description: "You sure have gone out of your way for me. You really are a strange one, you know that?"
